programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Amber Reeve/Kumari Fulbright
programs.desc: When book smart, Amber Reeve�s jailhouse romance turns deadly she must decide if her newfound love is worth more than her freedom. Later, beauty queen, Kumari Fulbright�s, dream of becoming a lawyer crumbles when a dangerous love triangle unravels.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Tiffani Jacobs/Jackie Wortham
programs.desc: After falling mysteriously ill, Tiffani Jacobs looks to a man to help her feel normal but her quest for love drives her to do the unthinkable. In Spokane, Washington, Jackie Wortham scorches a path of destruction with a lover who fuels her fire.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Risking It All
programs.desc: When a series of brazen, armed robberies strike local businesses in a tranquil community in Wisconsin, detectives find themselves with few clues to help them identify the perpetrators. That is, until police track down real-life Bonnie and Clyde willing to risk it all in the name of love.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When Police Officer Wayne Irby met Denise Miller, they both fell madly in love. But when both Wayne and Denise turn up missing, his fellow officers find out just how mad love can be.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When Kimberly Parker said “I do” to, Elihue Parker, he promised her the world. But their dreams  for a bright future are dashed when Elihue turns up missing.  As investigators delve deeper, they uncover a twisted ring of greed and deception that will leave them face to face with pure evil.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When a decorated Navy Commander is found dead in a hotel room, those close to him suspect suicide. But when autopsy results point to homicide, investigators sort through numerous lies to uncover a calculated plot fueled by lust and greed.
